title: Measure Less to Learn More: Using Fewer, Higher-quality Metrics to Capture What Matters
description: Too many experiment metrics can make meaningful changes harder to detect. Learn how Discord used simulations and Principal Component Analysis to maximize signal and reduce noise.

title: Making Discord on Desktop Look Just Right: Display Settings to Ease the Eyes
description: Learn all sorts of toggles, options, and features on Discord’s desktop app to help you view media at your pace, lower the strength of colors across the app, and make app content easier to see.

title: Discord Patch Notes: April 6, 2026
description: Check out the finer details of the more technical fixes implemented into Discord recently.

title: MULTIPLAYER SEQUEL TO ACCLAIMED AAAA GAME “THE LAST MEADOW” ANNOUNCED: PLAYABLE NOW
description: Band together with Discordians from across the world in Last Meadow Online, the world’s first DBMMIRPG. Available to play until April 7, 2026.

title: How Multi-Factor Authentication Helps Keep Your Discord Account Safe
description: A Discord account is more than just your username and avatar. That’s why it’s important to help keep your account safe and secure by using Multi-Factor Authentication, SMS Backup Authentication & QR Code Login. Learn how to keep your account more secure in the following blog post!

title: Discord Update: March 24, 2026 Changelog
description: Here's the Discord Changelog from March 24, 2026, so you can stay informed on what’s new in recent app updates!

title: How ROOST is Advancing Online Safety
description: The threat landscape online has shifted dramatically. Many online platforms are left to reinvent safety tools from scratch. That’s the gap ROOST was built to close — and it’s why open-sourcing battle-tested tools like Osprey matters so much.

title: You’re Now Discord Official: Developers, Claim Your Game and Verify Your Server
description: Developers can now claim and customize their game’s profiles on Discord. Curate your game’s presence on the platform to help people discover more about your game, and get your server verified in the process! Read on to see how it works.

title: Building on the Social Layer of Games: What’s New from GDC 2026
description: At GDC 2026, Discord gives developers more ways to close the gap between connection and play.

title: Discord Patch Notes: March 6, 2026
description: Check out the finer details of the more technical fixes implemented into Discord recently.

title: Tracing Discord's Elixir Systems (Without Melting Everything)
description: Join Senior Software Engineer Nick Krichevsky as he explains how Discord added distributed tracing to Elixir's message passing and optimized it to handle millions of concurrent users.

title: Getting Global Age Assurance Right: What We Got Wrong and What's Changing
description: Discord's CTO addresses community concerns about age assurance: no mass ID collection, new vendor transparency commitments, and a delayed global launch until second half of 2026.

title: Osprey: Open Sourcing our Rule Engine
description: Discord uses Osprey to quickly detect and remove new types of harm from putting our customers at risk. Now we’re open-sourcing this tool so others can do the same.

title: How to Change Your Theme to Bring Your Vibe to Discord
description: Add a splash of personality and make Discord pop by changing Discord’s color scheme! Learn how to adjust the look of Discord on both desktop and mobile.

title: Discord Patch Notes: February 4, 2026
description: Check out the finer details of the more technical fixes implemented into Discord recently.

title: How to Customize Your Discord Profile
description: Make your first impression count with a profile that represents you how YOU want to be seen. Learn how to edit and customize your profile to have it rep you the right way.

title: How to Make and Use Custom Emoji on Discord
description: Emojis on Discord are special — you can make a little picture out of almost any symbol, in-joke, or bizarre late-night inspiration.

title: Discord Patch Notes: December 8, 2025
description: Check out the finer details of the more technical fixes implemented into Discord recently.

title: Gift Ideas for the Dedicated Discord User in Your Life
description: We’ve got plenty of gift ideas, from those who game through the night, to those who decorate their profile just right — let’s dig in!

title: Your Discord Checkpoint is Rolling Out! Celebrate What You Did in 2025
description: How many messages did you send? How long did you hang out in voice? Who’d you talk with the most? Stop by your end-of-year Checkpoint, a recap of the stuff YOU did on Discord throughout the year!

title: Save and Display Your Faves: Add Discord Shop & Marvel Rivals Items to Your Profile’s Wishlist
description: Keep track of all the stuff from the Shop you’ve been wanting to purchase with the new Wishlist feature. Display the stuff you’ve been eyeing on your profile, and if you’re lucky enough, maybe one of your friends may see it and gift it to you…

title: Bringing In-Game Commerce to Discord Communities
description: By bringing commerce directly to official game communities, we're giving game developers the opportunity to benefit from these dynamics, creating incremental revenue that complements their existing storefronts.

title: How to Link Discord to Battlefield 6, Marvel Rivals & More
description: Some of the most popular multiplayer games have added the ability to directly link your Discord account to the game! Learn how to link your Discord account to some big-name titles and see what sorta perks it provides.

title: How to Share What You’re Playing, Listening to, or Watching as Your Status on Discord
description: Playing a game right now? Listening to some tunes, or catching up on that one anime your friends won’t stop talking about? Learn how to show off what you’re up to as your Discord status and show @everyone what’s up!

description: Check out the finer details of the more technical fixes implemented into Discord recently.

title: From Single-Node to Multi-GPU Clusters: How Discord Made Distributed Compute Easy for ML Engineers
description: From manual GPU configs to one-command clusters: Join Serrana Aguirregaray and Nathaniel Jenkins as they tell the story of Discord's journey to build a developer-friendly ML infrastructure on Ray for 200M+ monthly active users.

title: During October, Treat a Friend to Nitro and Trick Out Your Profile for Halloween 🎃

title: New Looks for Nitro, New Looks for You. Get Yourself a Nitro-exclusive Profile Bundle!
description: Between now and September 30th, 2025, new and existing Nitro members can claim a profile bundle matching Nitro's new look, including an Avatar Decoration, Profile Effect, and a Nameplate! Open this blog to see the details.

title: Staff Picks, September 2025: Welcome to Our Video Game Museum

title: Bringing DAVE to All Discord Platforms
description: From March 1st, 2026, all clients and apps must be updated to utilize DAVE’s end-to-end encryption support for voice and video calls. In this blog, we explore the challenges we encountered bringing E2EE to browsers, and share what you may need to do to ensure your app can still connect to voice calls in 2026.

title: Starting Your First Discord Server
description: Looking to create a new Discord server for the first time? How do you invite your friends to it? What even IS a text or voice channel in Discord? Follow along as we help you start up a new place to talk and play games with your friends.

title: Transforming Game Discovery with Instant Play Experiences on Discord
description: Discord and NVIDIA partner to showcase cloud-streamed gaming experiences on Discord to transform game discovery for players and developers, starting with Fortnite.

title: Discord’s Powerful Cross-Platform Chat: Ready for Your Game
description: The Discord Social SDK is coming out of closed beta! Developers can now take advantage of Discord’s voice and text chat in their games and help players connect for longer playtimes by enhancing their multiplayer experiences.

title: Introducing the Community Server Cleanup Report for August 2025
description: Discord has built a whole new team dedicated to bringing communities more control, more power, and fewer reasons to scream into the void. Check out the first things they've done, including fixes and improvements for server management issues, onboarding, Forum channels, and mod tools.

title: ROOST Announces “Coop” and “Osprey”: Free, Open-Source Trust and Safety Infrastructure for the AI Era
description: NEW YORK, NY [July 21, 2025] — ROOST, a non-profit organization dedicated to building scalable, resilient, and open-source safety tools for the AI era, is proud to announce two new tools: Coop and Osprey. Together, they offer a powerful foundation for developers, platforms, and Trust and Safety teams to detect, triage, and respond to harmful content online — without the need to buy expensive enterprise software or to build complex internal systems.

title: Discord for Business Vol. 2: Cannes-worthy ad product updates
description: Built-in rewards, brand lift analytics, mobile Quests… and our Cannes highlights!

title: Reward Your Play: Complete Quests. Earn Orbs. Get Sweet Stuff.
description: Introducing a new type of Quest reward: Discord Orbs! Earn them by completing Quests and redeem them in the Shop for hundreds of different items — including Discord Nitro credit. Available on desktop and mobile.

title: *FLAILS AROUND* SUMMER SPECIAL! JOIN NITRO, GET AN EXTRA MONTH OF NITRO ON US!

title: How to Set Up Your Server’s Roles for Members, Mods & Admins
description: There’s a LOT of Role permissions to comb through for your Discord server, and every community has its own needs. In this article, we’ll give some general guidance on each permission to help you decide what works best.

title: Checkpoint 3: Leveling Up Discord Quests with Orbs and Advanced Measurement
description: We're expanding our Quests advertising product with a new reward for users: Discord Orbs. We’re also introducing a new partnership with Kantar, which will further enhance the return on investment measurement and analytics capabilities of Quests for advertisers.

description: Exclusive to partners and friends, this newsletter brings you the latest updates on business opportunities within the world of Discord. Read the first issue and sign up for future entries on the Blog!

title: Thank You for Ten Years
description: As we celebrate our tenth trip around the sun, let’s see what you and your friends have been up to on Discord over the past decade.

title: Staff Picks, May 2025: The Games That Brought Us to Discord

description: For this year’s Power of the Force celebrations, we’re hyped to release a brand-new collection of Star Wars themed Avatar Decorations and Profile Effects!

title: How Discord Indexes Trillions of Messages
description: Learn how Discord scaled its search infrastructure to index trillions of messages and unlock new features.

title: Discord Appoints Humam Sakhnini as Chief Executive Officer
description: SAN FRANCISCO, April 23, 2025 — Discord today announced the appointment of Humam Sakhnini as Chief Executive Officer, effective Monday, April 28, 2025. Sakhnini will also join Discord’s Board of Directors. Jason Citron, who co-founded Discord with Stanislav Vishnevskiy and has served as CEO since its inception, will remain on the Board of Directors and transition to a role as Advisor to the CEO. Vishnevskiy will continue serving in his capacity as Chief Technology Officer.

title: Passing the Torch
description: Read the message sent to Discord employees from CEO Jason Citron sharing his decision to transition out of the role and appoint Humam Sakhnini as the company's new chief executive.

title: Worthy of a Plaque: Nameplates Land in the Shop
description: Today, we’re announcing a brand new way to express yourself: Nameplates. Add a pop of personality to your display name when it’s shown in your favorite chat channels. Read on to see how they work!

title: Make More Closet Space! Nitro Members Can Now Keep Avatar Decoration Quest Rewards for Longer
description: With Nitro, your Quest rewards don’t fade—hold onto exclusive decorations long after the adventure ends.

title: How to Use Discord’s In-Game Overlay to Talk While Playing on PC
description: Discord’s In-Game Overlay lets you join voice and video calls, see who’s talkin’, and stream your gameplay without ever having to alt-tab out of your current match! Learn how it works and how you can customize it to your liking.

title: Overclocking dbt: Discord's Custom Solution in Processing Petabytes of Data
description: Explore how Discord supercharged dbt with a tailored solution designed for performance, developer productivity, and data quality.

title: Wicked Saints Turns Players into IRL Superheroes with the Help of e.l.f. Beauty and Discord
description: Medford, Oregon – April 8, 2025 – Wicked Saints Studios today launches World Reborn, featuring collaborations with e.l.f. Beauty (NYSE: ELF), Discord, Starlight Children's Foundation, and more. World Reborn is an interactive story game with real-world quests that make real-life impact. It is the first game ever that will reveal players' “character strengths” and help them use their strengths to better their day-to-day reality.

title: MAJOR NEWS: DISCORD ANNOUNCES ITS FIRST IN-HOUSE AAAA VIDEO GAME, “THE LAST MEADOW”
description: Discord’s new in-house studio Big Wump Games announces its first release: The Last Meadow. Available from April 1 to April 7, 2025 exclusively on Discord.

title: Checkpoint 2: Our First Year With Discord Quests
description: In 2024, we launched Quests, an innovative rewarded ad format designed for Discord’s gaming audience. Join us as we look back at over 70 campaigns run during our first year.

description: Stickers on Discord let you express yourself in BIG ways. Learn how to create, upload, and use stickers on Discord.

description: Here's the Discord Changelog from March 25, 2025, so you can stay informed on what’s new in recent app updates!

title: Revamped Overlay & Refreshed Desktop Give Game Time a Boost
description: We’re releasing a new and improved version of the Game Overlay, along with a refreshed desktop app so you can further customize Discord to your style.

title: Discord Announces First Mobile Ad Format, Broadening Advertising Opportunities
description: ‍SAN FRANCISCO, March 20, 2025 – Discord announces plans to expand its successful Video Quests advertising format to mobile devices. This strategic move marks the company's first mobile ad offering, significantly broadening reach for advertisers while maintaining Discord's commitment to user-first, reward-focused advertising experiences. The initial pilot for Video Quests on Mobile will launch in June 2025, offering advertisers a prime opportunity to showcase trailers, make impactful announcements, and highlight premium content to Discord’s player community.

title: Announcing Discord’s Social SDK, Helping Power Your Game’s Social Experiences
description: SAN FRANCISCO, March 17, 2025 – Discord announces the launch of Discord Social SDK, a toolkit that enables developers of all sizes to tap into Discord’s social infrastructure to drive their game’s social and multiplayer experiences for all their players — with or without a Discord account — at no cost. Developers can not only harness the SDK to power in-game communication and connectivity for all players, but they can also provide an even more integrated and engaging experience for their Discord-connected players while further benefiting from Discord’s social features to drive discovery and growth for their games.

title: Announcing Discord’s Social SDK, Helping Power Your Game’s Social Experiences
description: Today, we’re announcing our new Social SDK that empowers game developers of all sizes to implement Discord-powered features directly in their games, helping players easily talk, connect and enhance their social experiences.

title: The Game Developer Playbook, Part One: Getting Started on Discord
description: We'll create a home where you can monitor playtests, gather feedback, and talk with those who want to be part of your game's success.

title: The Game Developer Playbook, Part Two: Early Access and Pre-Launch
description: In Part Two, we'll help inspire the creation of real-time conversations around your game and foster engagement within your community.

description: In this segment of our GameDev Playbook, we'll look at three communities that represent what we consider best-in-class server setups.

description: Recently Discord's Media Infrastructure team has modernized the app's image pipeline by adding support for animated WebP and AVIF formats! Join Scott Kidder as he explains how the team implemented support for these newer image formats.
